name: architect
description: Architecture toolkit for Claude Code. A staff/principal-grade architect on tap, organized as a Discover → Design → Decide → Document → Review cycle. Includes a router skill (role), narrow specialist skills (C4, ADR, system design, code review, research, frontend, backend, AI agents), slash commands, sub-agents, and a project-level ARCHITECTURE.md template. Companion to the `product` plugin in the Kramar Studio Suite.
